description: new-api AI 网关 Relay 流量监控面板

targets.expr: sum(rate(newapi_relay_requests_total{status=~"$status", user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

sum(increase(newapi_relay_requests_total{status="error", user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(increase(newapi_relay_requests_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])), 1)

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (increase(newapi_relay_request_duration_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])))
sum(newapi_relay_active_requests{api_type=~"$api_type"})

sum(increase(newapi_relay_requests_total{status=~"$status", user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum(increase(newapi_relay_tokens_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (model) (rate(newapi_relay_requests_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

sum by (username) (rate(newapi_relay_requests_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

sum by (model) (increase(newapi_relay_requests_total{status="error", user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (model) (increase(newapi_relay_requests_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])), 1)

panels.title: 错误请求 按错误类型

targets.expr: sum by (error_type) (increase(newapi_relay_requests_total{status="error", user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (increase(newapi_relay_request_duration_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (increase(newapi_relay_request_duration_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (increase(newapi_relay_request_duration_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, model) (increase(newapi_relay_request_duration_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (increase(newapi_relay_first_token_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (increase(newapi_relay_first_token_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (increase(newapi_relay_first_token_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, model) (increase(newapi_relay_first_token_seconds_bucket{user_id=~"$user_id", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id", api_type=~"$api_type"}[$__rate_interval])))
sum by (token_type) (increase(newapi_relay_tokens_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (model) (increase(newapi_relay_tokens_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (username) (increase(newapi_relay_quota_consumed_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (model) (increase(newapi_relay_quota_consumed_total{user_id=~"$user_id", username=~"$username", model=~"$model", group=~"$group", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (api_type) (newapi_relay_active_requests{api_type=~"$api_type"})
process_resident_memory_bytes
go_goroutines
sum by (channel_name) (rate(newapi_relay_requests_total{channel_id!="", channel_name=~"$channel_name", channel_type=~"$channel_type"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

sum(increase(newapi_relay_requests_total{status="success", channel_id!="", channel_name=~"$channel_name", channel_type=~"$channel_type"}[5m])) by (channel_name) / sum(increase(newapi_relay_requests_total{channel_id!="", channel_name=~"$channel_name", channel_type=~"$channel_type"}[5m])) by (channel_name)

panels.title: P95 请求时延 按渠道

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(newapi_relay_request_duration_seconds_bucket{channel_id!="", channel_name=~"$channel_name", channel_type=~"$channel_type"}[5m])) by (le, channel_name))
sum(increase(newapi_relay_channel_errors_total{channel_name=~"$channel_name", channel_type=~"$channel_type"}[5m])) by (channel_name, error_type)
newapi_relay_channel_status{channel_name=~"$channel_name", channel_type=~"$channel_type"}
